creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Quite a lot of work has been done on the ata driver since 
4.4-RELEASE.  Can anyone confirm that this problem exists 
in a 2002 4.4-STABLE or 4.5-RC? 

Please copy your feedback to <bug-followup@freebsd.org>, using the 
subject line of this message.
